header.title: A simple public path for accessible software

paragraphs: N칢 form, raan eb톝팯n al칢u b칦 w톝팯t de k톖c c칦 lu칬i b톝팯n l톝팯k akutnhom de IATF. Ku na l칢u akutnhom k칢n칢, ke akutnhom 칢b톝팯n de GitHub ab칢 l톖팯톖팯m 칢 lu톖i k칢n칢.
